message:
beads: add 22 new beads from deep spec-vs-bead audit (Session 17)

Systematic line-by-line audit of all 18K+ spec lines against existing
beads identified critical gaps in §1, §4, §5, and cross-cutting testing.

New beads by section:
- §1 (4): golden-file oracle, no-tokio enforcement, systematic ECS layout, GF256 vectorization
- §4 (11): e-process framework, MVCC monitors INV-1..7, BOCPD, cancellation protocol, obligations, policy controller, remote computations, networking stack, supervision tree, resilience combinators, observability
- §5 (6): cleanup_orphaned_slots, lock table rebuild, serialized/concurrent CAS, index regen on rebase, wire payload schemas, group commit batching
- Cross-cutting (5): Pratt precedence (11 levels), varint 9-byte edge cases, SHM hash function (383), Cx+sealed traits, WAL checksum recovery
- §2,3,12-15 (7): SSI perf validation, RFC 6330 conformance, trigger frame stack, BEGIN CONCURRENT 2PC, newer functions, newer extensions, exclusions tests

Total: 219 open beads, 113 actionable, 0 cycles.
Each bead includes detailed spec content, implementation guidance, and
comprehensive unit test specifications (200+ new test specs total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
